idea-plugin.name: Godot LSP
idea-plugin.description:
Connects to the Godot 4 GDScript Language Server for live diagnostics, code completion, and documentation in any JetBrains IDE.

Features:

  • Auto-detects Godot projects via project.godot
  • Connects to the running Godot editor's LSP server
  • Live diagnostics (errors and warnings)
  • Code completion with node path support ($)
  • Status bar widget showing connection state
  • Configurable port and Godot path

Usage: Open a Godot project, start the Godot editor, then open any .gd file. The plugin connects automatically.
